deployment_version.title: Deployment Version
deployment_version.description: Version string of the client-side controller

is_healthy.title: Is Healthy
is_healthy.description: Overall health flag from the client deployment

details.title: Details
details.description: Details of the client cluster deployment and its configuration

reported_at_utc.title: Reported At Utc
reported_at_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the client generated this report

org_id.title: Org Id
org_id.description: Org integer ID on the client deployment

service_account_count.title: Service Account Count
service_account_count.description: Number of active service accounts in this org

retry_delay_s.title: Retry Delay S
retry_delay_s.description: Initial time in seconds to wait before retrying

retry_delay_multiplier.title: Retry Delay Multiplier
retry_delay_multiplier.description: Multiplier for retry delay on successive retries

max_retries.title: Max Retries
max_retries.description: Maximum number of tries (includes first attempt)

max_request_latency_s.title: Max Request Latency S
max_request_latency_s.description: Max latency in seconds before timing out

max_fallback_hops.title: Max Fallback Hops
max_fallback_hops.description: Maximum number of fallback hops (includes first attempt)

circuit_breaker_request_threshold.title: Circuit Breaker Request Threshold
circuit_breaker_request_threshold.description: Min requests before checking circuit breaker

circuit_breaker_failure_threshold_pct.title: Circuit Breaker Failure Threshold Pct
circuit_breaker_failure_threshold_pct.description: Failure percentage to trigger circuit breaker

circuit_breaker_duration_s.title: Circuit Breaker Duration S
circuit_breaker_duration_s.description: Duration in seconds to keep circuit breaker open

circuit_breaker_sliding_window_time_s.title: Circuit Breaker Sliding Window Time S
circuit_breaker_sliding_window_time_s.description: Time window in seconds for circuit breaker

circuit_breaker_sliding_window_resolutio.title: Circuit Breaker Sliding Window Resolution S
circuit_breaker_sliding_window_resolutio.description: Bucket size in seconds for circuit breaker

RetryFallbackPolicy.title: RetryFallbackPolicy
RetryFallbackPolicy.description:
Combined retry, circuit breaker, and fallback policy configuration.
Validation runs on creation and when setting via the ServiceAccount property.

total_org_count.title: Total Org Count
total_org_count.description: Total orgs on the client deployment

total_service_account_count.title: Total Service Account Count
total_service_account_count.description: Total service accounts across all orgs

reported_at_utc.title: Reported At Utc
reported_at_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the client generated this report
